global.description: The ad features a warm orange background with a clear focus on food delivery offers.
global.main_message: Promoting quick meal delivery with a discount.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A vibrant orange background fills the canvas, providing a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Dinner in minutes
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Dinner in minutes' is prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: 30% off text
elements.description: Smaller white text indicating '30% off' is positioned above the headline, emphasizing the discount.

elements.label: Free delivery text
elements.description: A line of white text stating 'Free delivery over $15' is placed above the headline, adding value to the offer.

elements.label: Food icons
elements.description: Two simple line-drawn food icons are centered below the headline, representing the meal options available.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A prominent white button with black text saying 'Claim reward' is located at the bottom of the ad, inviting action.

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: The logo 'FreshDash' appears in a bold font at the top left corner, establishing brand identity.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label marked 'UGC' is positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A bright yellow badge with the word 'SALE' is placed at the top right corner, drawing attention to the promotion.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An unidentified element with minimal visual detail, possibly decorative or functional.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: Another unidentified element that does not contribute significantly to the overall message.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, unclear element that may serve a decorative purpose.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and inviting, key elements include food icons and discount offers.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, with the logo at the top left, and the CTA at the bottom.
